name: QA 1649
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1649

pmrep -5|--ignore-unknown workout



Copyright (c) 2026 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py debian12-container reproduce
